summary: The diff implements most requirements but is missing the required mood-based resource card images and has incomplete evidence for REQ-42. REQ-43 and REQ-44 are implemented with ResourceCard.tsx and flip animations. REQ-45 and REQ-46 show pop artist content added to moodResourceLinks.ts (truncated). REQ-47 and REQ-48 add extensive speech synthesis logging in ResponseDisplay.tsx and useSpeechSynthesis.ts.

missing_requirements.requirement: Convert the food, music, stories, self-care, and videos resource links to display as clickable image cards instead of text links in the cloud shape layout
missing_requirements.reason: The required image files (food-mood-card.dim_200x200.png, music-mood-card.dim_200x200.png, stories-mood-card.dim_200x200.png, selfcare-mood-card.dim_200x200.png, videos-mood-card.dim_200x200.png) are not present in the diff. ResourceCard.tsx expects imageSrc prop but no image files were added.
